      • addAdjList

        public Status addAdjList​(AdjListType adjListType,
                         FileType fileType)
        Description copied from interface: EdgeInfo
        Add an adjacency list information to the edge info. The adjacency list information indicating the adjacency list stored with CSR, CSC, or COO format.
        Specified by:
        addAdjList in interface EdgeInfo
        Parameters:
        adjListType - The type of the adjacency list to add.
        fileType - The file type of the adjacency list topology and offset chunk file.
        Returns:
        A Status object indicating success or an error if the adjacency list type has already been added.

      • nativeAddAdjList0

        public static @com.alibaba.fastffi.FFINameAlias("AddAdjList"),@com.alibaba.fastffi.CXXValue long nativeAddAdjList0​(long ptr,
                                                                                                                   long rv_base,
                                                                                                                   int adjListType0,
                                                                                                                   int fileType1)

      • addAdjList

        public Status addAdjList​(AdjListType adjListType,
                         FileType fileType,
                         StdString prefix)
        Description copied from interface: EdgeInfo
        Add an adjacency list information to the edge info. The adjacency list information indicating the adjacency list stored with CSR, CSC, or COO format.
        Specified by:
        addAdjList in interface EdgeInfo
        Parameters:
        adjListType - The type of the adjacency list to add.
        fileType - The file type of the adjacency list topology and offset chunk file.
        prefix - The prefix of the adjacency list topology chunk (optional, default is empty).
        Returns:
        A Status object indicating success or an error if the adjacency list type has already been added.

      • nativeAddAdjList1

      • addPropertyGroup

        public Status addPropertyGroup​(PropertyGroup propertyGroup,
                               AdjListType adjListType)
        Description copied from interface: EdgeInfo
        Add a property group to edge info for the given adjacency list type.
        Specified by:
        addPropertyGroup in interface EdgeInfo
        Parameters:
        propertyGroup - Property group to add.
        adjListType - Adjacency list type to add property group to.
        Returns:
        A Status object indicating success or an error if adj_list_type is not supported by edge info or if the property group is already added to the adjacency list type.
